headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 13, 2026**
article:
The Cleveland Guardians secured a thrilling 3-2 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, with Hunter Gaddis earning the win. The New York Yankees took down the Baltimore Orioles 6-2, with Will Warren earning the win after pitching 5.2 innings with 6 strikeouts and 2 earned runs. The Washington Nationals dominated the Cincinnati Reds 10-4, led by Daylen Lile's three home runs and four RBIs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, affecting their teams' lineups. Grant Wolfram, a left-handed pitcher for the Baltimore Orioles, has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a low back strain. The move is retroactive to May 9, 2026. Other notable injuries include Jacob Wilson (Athletics), José Caballero (New York Yankees), Sean Murphy (Atlanta Braves), Addison Barger (Toronto Blue Jays), Eli White (Atlanta Braves), Justin Verlander (Detroit Tigers), and Kerry Carpenter (Detroit Tigers).

The Arizona Diamondbacks made a significant trade, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas. Additionally, the Cleveland Guardians acquired catcher Patrick Bailey from the San Francisco Giants in a trade involving left-hander Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles also acquired right-handers Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash.

top_news.title: **Guardians Edge Angels in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured a 3-2 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, with Hunter Gaddis earning the win. Angel Martínez led the Angels' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, while Slade Cecconi pitched 4 strong innings for the Angels.

top_news.title: **Yankees Take Down Orioles 6-2**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Will Warren earning the win after pitching 5.2 innings with 6 strikeouts and 2 earned runs. Trent Grisham led the Yankees' offense with a home run, 3 RBIs, and 1 hit in 3 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Reds 10-4**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a decisive victory over the Cincinnati Reds, with a strong performance from their offense and bullpen. Daylen Lile led the charge at the plate, hitting 3 home runs and driving in 4 runs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Pirates in 1-3 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 1-3 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Paul Skenes leading the Pirates' pitching effort. Skenes threw 8.0 innings, striking out 10 batters and allowing 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Place Grant Wolfram on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Baltimore Orioles left-handed pitcher Grant Wolfram has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a low back strain. The move is retroactive to May 9, 2026.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Acquire Requena in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks have made a move, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena in a trade with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Requena joins the Diamondbacks in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas.
